objective: Add five governance agents to agents/: codex-brief, som-worker-triage, issue-lane-bootstrap, sim-runner, and backlog-promoter. Update CLAUDE.md routing table and delegation rules. Write docs/agents-adoption-guide.md covering all 9 governance agents with per-repo configuration checklist. Complete Stage 6 closeout.
scope_boundary: agents/codex-brief.md — authors and validates Codex Spark dispatch briefs encoding all 5 dispatch prerequisites
agents/som-worker-triage.md — reads raw/packets/inbound/, applies SoM routing table, checks Worker availability, emits triage table
agents/issue-lane-bootstrap.md — bootstraps a new governance issue lane: worktree, branch, execution-scope skeleton
agents/sim-runner.md — invokes hldpro-sim via CodexCliProvider, writes run artifacts to raw/packets/outbound/
agents/backlog-promoter.md — HITL agent promoting CODEX-FLAGGED ingestion findings to PROGRESS.md or FAIL_FAST_LOG.md
docs/agents-adoption-guide.md — cross-repo adoption guide for all 9 governance agents
CLAUDE.md — routing table and delegation rules updated with 5 new agent rows
OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md — Done section updated with issue #559 entry
out_of_scope: Changes to existing overlord, overlord-sweep, overlord-audit, or verify-completion agent files
Changes to any code under scripts/, packages/, or .github/workflows/
Live invocation of codex exec or any Worker model
Changes to any downstream repo (AIS, HealthcarePlatform, LAM, knocktracker, Stampede)
Writing raw/packets/ inbound or outbound content (the new agents handle that at runtime)
research_summary: Four governance agents already exist in agents/ (overlord, overlord-sweep, overlord-audit, verify-completion). The codex-brief template is at docs/templates/codex-spark-dispatch-brief.md per issue #412/PR #417. The SoM routing table is canonical in STANDARDS.md §Society of Minds. The hldpro-sim package (issue #407) is released as v0.1.0 and consumed by Stampede (issue #425). The codex-ingestion flow is established and CODEX-FLAGGED entries appear in ~/.codex-ingestion/*/backlog-*.md. Agent frontmatter must include name, description, model, tools per STANDARDS.md §DA agent schema.
research_artifacts: agents/overlord.md, agents/overlord-sweep.md, agents/overlord-audit.md, agents/verify-completion.md — existing agent examples
STANDARDS.md §Society of Minds — SoM routing table + Worker availability rules

sprints.name: Sprint 1 — Five agent files
sprints.goal: Write all five agent files to agents/ with correct frontmatter and body content.
tasks: Write agents/codex-brief.md with haiku model pin and 7-step dispatch brief authoring procedure
Write agents/som-worker-triage.md with haiku model pin and Worker availability checking procedure
Write agents/issue-lane-bootstrap.md with haiku model pin and lane bootstrap procedure
Write agents/sim-runner.md with claude-sonnet-4-6 model pin and hldpro-sim invocation procedure
Write agents/backlog-promoter.md with claude-sonnet-4-6 model pin and HITL CODEX-FLAGGED promotion procedure
acceptance_criteria: All 5 agent files have name, description, model, tools frontmatter fields
som-worker-triage.md references STANDARDS.md §Society of Minds routing table
issue-lane-bootstrap.md produces execution-scope skeleton at raw/execution-scopes/
sim-runner.md specifies CodexCliProvider only — AnthropicApiProvider is explicitly excluded
backlog-promoter.md requires explicit per-finding operator confirmation before any write

sprints.name: Sprint 2 — Adoption guide + CLAUDE.md + OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md
sprints.goal: Write cross-repo adoption guide, update CLAUDE.md routing table and delegation rules, and add Done entry to OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md.
tasks: Write docs/agents-adoption-guide.md covering all 9 governance agents (4 existing + 5 new) with trigger phrases, model pins, and per-repo configuration checklist
Update CLAUDE.md Routing Table with 5 new rows for new agents
Update CLAUDE.md Delegation Rules with 5 new DO NOT rules
Update OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md Done section with issue #559 entry
acceptance_criteria: docs/agents-adoption-guide.md has complete table of all 9 agents
CLAUDE.md routing table has codex-brief, som-worker-triage, issue-lane-bootstrap, sim-runner, backlog-promoter rows
CLAUDE.md delegation rules explicitly prohibit dispatcher from doing these tasks directly
OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md Done section has issue #559 row at the top

sprints.name: Sprint 3 — Governance artifacts + closeout
sprints.goal: Write PDCAR, execution scope, and Stage 6 closeout. Run closeout hook.
acceptance_criteria: Execution scope JSON is valid and references this plan
Closeout fills all required TEMPLATE.md fields

specialist_reviews.focus: Confirm all writes stay within the 12 declared allowed_write_paths. No code files, no workflow files, no downstream repo files.
specialist_reviews.summary: All changes are documentation and agent files under agents/, docs/plans/, docs/, raw/, CLAUDE.md, and OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md. No scripts, packages, or workflow files are modified.
evidence: CLAUDE.md — routing and delegation rules only

specialist_reviews.focus: Verify all 5 new agents have required frontmatter: name, description, model, tools; model pins match SoM routing charter.
specialist_reviews.summary: codex-brief and som-worker-triage and issue-lane-bootstrap are pinned to haiku (Tier 1 orchestration). sim-runner and backlog-promoter are pinned to claude-sonnet-4-6 (Tier 0 review/complex reasoning). All match SoM routing table.
evidence: STANDARDS.md §Society of Minds — model routing table

alternate_model_review.summary: This is an agent documentation and routing update — no standards changes, no new architecture, no new CI enforcement. SoM charter does not require alternate-model review for documentation-only governance surface writes.
evidence: STANDARDS.md §Society of Minds — alternate review triggers: architecture PRs and standards changes only

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: All 3 sprints implemented by claude-sonnet-4-6 in worktree issue-559-five-new-agents-20260422. Dispatcher reviews commit log and opens PR.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Dispatcher: review git log --oneline origin/main..HEAD; verify all 12 files staged; push branch and open PR against main.

material_deviation_rules: If any agent file modifies files outside agents/ or docs/, HALT and re-scope.
If CLAUDE.md exceeds 60 lines after update, audit for bloat before committing.
If closeout-hook.sh exits non-zero, fix the closeout before committing.
If validate_structured_agent_cycle_plan.py returns FAIL, fix the JSON before any other commit.
If a new agent references a Worker model other than haiku or claude-sonnet-4-6, verify against SoM routing table before proceeding.
